kv.skill:735cfd64-fafe-450d-ae77-355c00f4c6:
{
  "id": "735cfd64-fafe-450d-ae77-355c00f4c6ca",
  "name": "keyword-extractor",
  "description": "Extracts key terms from a research text",
  "domain": "research",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "implementation": "const text = String(input.text ?? \"\");\nif (!text) return { keywords: [], confidence: 0 };\n// Naive: returns unique words > 5 chars, no stop-word filtering\nconst words = text.toLowerCase().split(/\\W+/);\nconst keywords = [...new Set(words.filter(w => w.length > 5))].slice(0, 10);\nreturn { keywords, confidence: 0.4 };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "text",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Research text to analyze",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of keyword-extractor",
  "parentId": null,
  "generation": 0,
  "originAgent": "ResearchEvolver-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": null,
  "fitnessScore": 60,
  "usageCount": 0,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [],
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": 1777368126591,
  "updatedAt": 1777368126591,
  "storageKey": "skill:735cfd64-fafe-450d-ae77-355c00f4c6ca",
  "sealedInferenceAttestation": null,
  "onChainTxHash": null
}
kv.skill:38d2b630-e6b7-40c6-b6e2-3a8b9234c2:
{
  "id": "38d2b630-e6b7-40c6-b6e2-3a8b9234c2c4",
  "name": "research-summarizer",
  "description": "Produces a structured research summary from text",
  "domain": "research",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "implementation": "const text = String(input.text ?? \"\");\nif (!text) return { summary: \"\", keyFindings: [], wordCount: 0 };\n// Naive: takes first 2 sentences, returns empty keyFindings\nconst sentences = text.split(/[.!?]+/).filter(s => s.trim().length > 0);\nconst summary = sentences.slice(0, 2).join(\". \") + \".\";\nreturn { summary, keyFindings: [], wordCount: text.split(\" \").length };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "text",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Research text to summarize",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of research-summarizer",
  "parentId": null,
  "generation": 0,
  "originAgent": "ResearchEvolver-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": null,
  "fitnessScore": 60,
  "usageCount": 0,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [],
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": 1777368126591,
  "updatedAt": 1777368126591,
  "storageKey": "skill:38d2b630-e6b7-40c6-b6e2-3a8b9234c2c4",
  "sealedInferenceAttestation": null,
  "onChainTxHash": null
}
kv.skill:325e9a4b-e6ef-4ec5-9dfe-fe9f6919c5:
{
  "id": "325e9a4b-e6ef-4ec5-9dfe-fe9f6919c53c",
  "name": "citation-extractor",
  "description": "Identifies and formats academic citations from text",
  "domain": "research",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "implementation": "const text = String(input.text ?? \"\");\n// Naive: only matches (Author, Year) pattern — misses many citation styles\nconst pattern = /\\(([A-Z][a-z]+(?:\\s+et\\s+al\\.)?),\\s*(\\d{4})\\)/g;\nconst citations = [];\nlet match;\nwhile ((match = pattern.exec(text)) !== null) {\n  citations.push({ author: match[1], year: match[2] });\n}\nreturn { citations, count: citations.length };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "text",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Academic text to scan for citations",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of citation-extractor",
  "parentId": null,
  "generation": 0,
  "originAgent": "ResearchEvolver-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": null,
  "fitnessScore": 60,
  "usageCount": 0,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [],
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": 1777368126591,
  "updatedAt": 1777368126591,
  "storageKey": "skill:325e9a4b-e6ef-4ec5-9dfe-fe9f6919c53c",
  "sealedInferenceAttestation": null,
  "onChainTxHash": null
}
kv.skill:1079d9af-5cd0-4453-a3be-6ca608c46d:
{
  "id": "1079d9af-5cd0-4453-a3be-6ca608c46dd7",
  "name": "code-reviewer",
  "description": "Reviews JavaScript/TypeScript code for bugs and security issues",
  "domain": "coding",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "implementation": "const code = String(input.code ?? \"\");\nif (!code) return { issues: [], score: 100, issueCount: 0, summary: \"No code to analyze\" };\nconst issues = [];\n// Naive: only finds console.log — misses SQL injection, missing await, etc.\nconst logMatches = code.match(/console\\.log/g) ?? [];\nif (logMatches.length > 0) {\n  issues.push({ type: \"debug-log\", severity: \"low\", count: logMatches.length, fix: \"Remove console.log\" });\n}\nreturn { issues, score: 100 - issues.length * 5, issueCount: issues.length, summary: issues.length === 0 ? \"Looks clean\" : \"Found \" + issues.length + \" issue(s)\" };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "code",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "JavaScript or TypeScript source code to review",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of code-reviewer",
  "parentId": null,
  "generation": 0,
  "originAgent": "ResearchEvolver-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": null,
  "fitnessScore": 60,
  "usageCount": 0,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [],
  "status": "retired",
  "createdAt": 1777368126591,
  "updatedAt": 1777368142558,
  "storageKey": "skill:1079d9af-5cd0-4453-a3be-6ca608c46dd7",
  "sealedInferenceAttestation": null,
  "onChainTxHash": null
}
kv.skill:257f77ba-ba0e-4621-9fc2-6171575552:
{
  "id": "257f77ba-ba0e-4621-9fc2-6171575552a5",
  "name": "code-reviewer",
  "description": "Reviews JavaScript/TypeScript code for bugs and security issues",
  "domain": "coding",
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "implementation": "const code = String(input.code ?? \"\");\nif (!code) return { issues: [], score: 100, issueCount: 0, summary: \"No code to analyze\" };\nconst issues = [];\nconst logMatches = code.match(/console\\.log/g) ?? [];\nconst sqlInjectionMatches = code.match(/(select|update|delete|insert)\\s/i) ?? [];\nconst missingAwaitMatches = code.match(/async\\s+function\\s+\\w+\\s*\\([^)]*\\)\\s*\\{[\\s\\S]*?}/g) ?? [];\n\nif (logMatches.length > 0) {\n  issues.push({ type: \"debug-log\", severity: \"low\", count: logMatches.length, fix: \"Remove console.log\" });\n}\nif (sqlInjectionMatches.length > 0) {\n  issues.push({ type: \"sql-injection\", severity: \"high\", count: sqlInjectionMatches.length, fix: \"Fix SQL injection vulnerabilities\" });\n}\nif (missingAwaitMatches.length > 0) {\n  issues.push({ type: \"missing-await\", severity: \"medium\", count: missingAwaitMatches.length, fix: \"Add await to async functions\" });\n}\n\nreturn { issues, score: 100 - issues.length * 5, issueCount: issues.length, summary: issues.length === 0 ? \"Looks clean\" : \"Found \" + issues.length + \" issue(s)\" };",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "code",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "JavaScript or TypeScript source code to review",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of code-reviewer",
  "parentId": "1079d9af-5cd0-4453-a3be-6ca608c46dd7",
  "generation": 1,
  "originAgent": "ResearchEvolver-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": "skill:1079d9af-5cd0-4453-a3be-6ca608c46dd7",
  "fitnessScore": 67,
  "usageCount": 1,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [
    {
      "taskId": "detect-sql-injection",
      "taskDescription": "Must detect SQL injection via string concatenation",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777368142552
    },
    {
      "taskId": "detect-missing-await",
      "taskDescription": "Must detect response.json() without await",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 0,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777368142552
    },
    {
      "taskId": "detect-missing-error-handling",
      "taskDescription": "Must detect async function without try-catch",
      "passed": false,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 0,
      "ranAt": 1777368142553
    },
    {
      "taskId": "no-false-positives",
      "taskDescription": "Clean code must not trigger critical/high alerts",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777368142554
    },
    {
      "taskId": "detect-empty-code",
      "taskDescription": "Empty input returns zero issues",
      "passed": true,
      "latencyMs": 0,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777368142554
    },
    {
      "taskId": "detect-stateful-regex",
      "taskDescription": "Must detect /g flag on regex used with .test() in a filter",
      "passed": false,
      "latencyMs": 1,
      "outputQualityScore": 0,
      "ranAt": 1777368142555
    }
  ],
